mount","type":"uint256"}],"name":"mintOutcomeTokens","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"oracleAdapter","outputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"outcomeToken","outputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"pause","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"paused","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"proxiableUUID","outputs":[{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"","type":"bytes32"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"marketId","type":"uint256"}],"name":"redeemWinningTokens","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"marketId","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"lpShares","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"minUsdc","type":"uint256"}],"name":"removeLiquidity","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"role","type":"bytes32"},{"internalType":"address","name":"callerConfirmation","type":"address"}],"name":"renounceRole","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"marketId","type":"uint256"}],"name":"resolveMarket","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"role","type":"bytes32"},{"internalType":"address","name":"account","type":"address"}],"name":"revokeRole","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"marketId","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint8","name":"outcome","type":"uint8"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"tokenAmountIn","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"minUsdcOut","type":"uint256"}],"name":"sell","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"usdcOut","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"newFee","type":"uint256"}],"name":"setFeeBps","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"bytes4","name":"interfaceId","type":"bytes4"}],"name":"supportsInterface","outputs":[{"internalType":"bool","name":"","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"unpause","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"newImplementation","type":"address"},{"internalType":"bytes","name":"data","type":"bytes"}],"name":"upgradeToAndCall","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"payable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"usdc","outputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"version","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"custom:security-contact":"security@predictionprotocol.xyz","details":"Demonstrates a real V1\u2192V2 upgrade path:           \u2022 Adds `version` storage variable (initialised to 2 via reinitializer)           \u2022 Adds `feeBps` governable fee (replaces the V1 FEE_BPS constant)           \u2022 Overrides `buy()` to use the new dynamic fee         Storage layout rule: new variables are appended AFTER the V1 __gap.         The __gap in PredictionMarket is reduced by the number of slots used here.","errors":{"AccessControlBadConfirmation()":[{"details":"The caller of a function is not the expected one. NOTE: Don't confuse with {AccessControlUnauthorizedAccount}."}],"AccessControlUnauthorizedAccount(address,bytes32)":[{"details":"The `account` is missing a role."}],"AddressEmptyCode(address)":[{"details":"There's no code at `target` (it is not a contract)."}],"AddressInsufficientBalance(address)":[{"details":"The ETH balance of the account is not enough to perform the operation."}],"ERC1967InvalidImplementation(address)":[{"details":"The `implementation` of the proxy is invalid."}],"ERC1967NonPayable()":[{"details":"An upgrade function sees `msg.value > 0` that may be lost."}],"EnforcedPause()":[{"details":"The operation failed because the contract is paused."}],"ExpectedPause()":[{"details":"The operation failed because the contract is not paused."}],"FailedInnerCall()":[{"details":"A call to an address target failed. The target may have reverted."}],"FeeTooHigh(uint256)":[{"params":{"proposed":"The fee value that was rejected"}}],"InvalidInitialization()":[{"details":"The contract is already initialized."}],"NotInitializing()":[{"details":"The contract is not initializing."}],"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}],"SafeERC20FailedOperation(address)":[{"details":"An operation with an ERC20 token failed."}],"UUPSUnauthorizedCallContext()":[{"details":"The call is from an unauthorized context."}],"UUPSUnsupportedProxiableUUID(bytes32)":[{"details":"The storage `slot` is unsupported as a UUID."}]},"events":{"CollateralMinted(uint256,address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount of each token minted","marketId":"Target market","user":"Address receiving the tokens"}},"FeeBpsUpdated(uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"newFee":"New fee in basis points","oldFee":"Previous fee in basis points"}},"Initialized(uint64)":{"details":"Triggered when the contract has been initialized or reinitialized."},"LiquidityAdded(uint256,address,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"marketId":"Target market","noAdded":"NO tokens added to reserve","provider":"Liquidity provider address","usdcAmount":"USDC deposited","yesAdded":"YES tokens added to reserve"}},"LiquidityRemoved(uint256,address,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"lpShares":"LP shares burned","marketId":"Target market","provider":"Liquidity provider address","usdcReturned":"USDC returned to provider"}},"MarketCreated(uint256,string,address,address)":{"params":{"creator":"Address that created the market","marketId":"Unique ID of the new market","oracleFeed":"Chainlink feed that will resolve the market","question":"The market question"}},"MarketResolved(uint256,uint8)":{"params":{"marketId":"Target market","winningOutcome":"1 = YES, 2 = NO"}},"Paused(address)":{"details":"Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`."},"RoleAdminChanged(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32)":{"details":"Emitted when `newAdminRole` is set as ``role``'s admin role, replacing `previousAdminRole` `DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE` is the starting admin for all roles, despite {RoleAdminChanged} not being emitted signaling this."},"RoleGranted(bytes32,address,address)":{"details":"Emitted when `account` is granted `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call, an admin role bearer except when using {AccessControl-_setupRole}."},"RoleRevoked(bytes32,address,address)":{"details":"Emitted when `account` is revoked `role`. `sender` is the account that originated the contract call:   - if using `revokeRole`, it is the admin role bearer   - if using `renounceRole`, it is the role bearer (i.e. `account`)"},"TokensPurchased(uint256,address,uint8,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"amountIn":"USDC spent","amountOut":"Outcome tokens received","buyer":"Buyer address","marketId":"Target market","outcome":"1 = YES, 2 = NO"}},"TokensSold(uint256,address,uint8,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"amountIn":"Outcome tokens sold","amountOut":"USDC received (after fee)","marketId":"Target market","outcome":"1 = YES, 2 = NO","seller":"Seller address"}},"Unpaused(address)":{"details":"Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`."},"Upgraded(address)":{"details":"Emitted when the implementation is upgraded."},"WinningsRedeemed(uint256,address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"USDC paid out","marketId":"Target market","redeemer":"Address redeeming tokens"}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"addLiquidity(uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Mints LP shares proportional to USDC contribution relative to         existing totalCollateral. Both YES and NO reserves grow proportionally.         CEI: slippage check \u2192 effects (shares, reserves) \u2192 interactions (pull USDC, mint tokens).","params":{"marketId":"Target market","minLpShares":"Minimum LP shares to receive (slippage protection)","usdcAmount":"USDC to deposit"}},"buy(uint256,uint8,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Identical logic to V1 buy() except FEE_BPS is replaced with feeBps.         CEI pattern:           Checks (market state, outcome validity, slippage)           \u2192 Effects (reserve update, fee accrual)           \u2192 Interactions (pull USDC, send fee, transfer outcome tokens)","params":{"amountIn":"USDC amount to spend (must be pre-approved)","marketId":"Target market ID","minAmountOut":"Minimum outcome tokens to receive (slippage protection)","outcome":"1 = YES, 2 = NO"},"returns":{"amountOut":"  Actual outcome tokens received"}},"createMarket(string,address,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"CEI pattern:           Checks: question non-empty, valid feed, future resolution, liquidity > 0           Effects: writes market struct, LP shares, reserves           Interactions: pull USDC, mint outcome tokens         Only callable by MARKET_CREATOR_ROLE.","params":{"initialLiquidity":"USDC amount used to seed the AMM (split equally YES/NO)","oracleFeed":"Chainlink feed address used for resolution","question":"Human-readable question string","resolutionTime":"Earliest Unix timestamp at which oracle resolution is valid"},"returns":{"marketId":"The newly assigned market ID"}},"getLpShares(uint256,address)":{"params":{"marketId":"Target market","provider":"Liquidity provider address"},"returns":{"_0":"LP share balance"}},"getMarket(uint256)":{"params":{"marketId":"Target market"},"returns":{"_0":"The Market struct"}},"getPrice(uint256,uint8)":{"details":"price(YES) = noReserve / (yesReserve + noReserve) * 1e18         price(NO)  = yesReserve / (yesReserve + noReserve) * 1e18","params":{"marketId":"Target market","outcome":"1 = YES, 2 = NO"},"returns":{"price":"in 1e18 (range 0 < price < 1e18)"}},"getRoleAdmin(bytes32)":{"details":"Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}."},"getTotalLpShares(uint256)":{"params":{"marketId":"Target market"},"returns":{"_0":"Total LP shares outstanding"}},"grantRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event."},"hasRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Returns `true` if `account` has been granted `role`."},"initialize(address,address,address,address,address)":{"details":"Must be called exactly once via the proxy's initialize() call.         Grants all roles to _admin.","params":{"_admin":"Address receiving all privileged roles","_feeVault":"FeeVault (ERC-4626) contract address","_oracleAdapter":"OracleAdapter contract address","_outcomeToken":"OutcomeToken (ERC-1155) contract address","_usdc":"USDC token address"}},"initializeV2()":{"details":"Uses reinitializer(2) \u2014 can only be called once per proxy after V1.         Sets version = 2 and feeBps = 30 (same default as V1 constant)."},"marketCount()":{"returns":{"_0":"Number of markets created"}},"mintOutcomeTokens(uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Useful for providing two-sided positions without going through AMM.         CEI: check amount > 0, pull USDC, mint tokens, update collateral.","params":{"amount":"USDC to lock; user receives `amount` YES + `amount` NO tokens","marketId":"Target market (must not be resolved)"}},"pause()":{"details":"Only callable by PAUSER_ROLE"},"paused()":{"details":"Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise."},"proxiableUUID()":{"details":"Implementation of the ERC1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier."},"redeemWinningTokens(uint256)":{"details":"Payout = userBalance * totalCollateral / totalWinningSupply         CEI pattern strictly enforced: balance checks \u2192 state updates         (burn) \u2192 USDC transfer.","params":{"marketId":"Target resolved market"}},"removeLiquidity(uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Burns `lpShares` from msg.sender and returns proportional USDC.         Corresponding outcome tokens held by the contract are burned too.         removeLiquidity is NOT guarded by whenNotPaused so LPs can always exit.","params":{"lpShares":"LP shares to burn","marketId":"Target market","minUsdc":"Minimum USDC to receive (slippage protection)"}},"renounceRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"resolveMarket(uint256)":{"details":"Can be called by anyone once resolutionTime has passed and the         oracle data is fresh. Price > 0 \u2192 YES wins; price == 0 \u2192 NO wins.","params":{"marketId":"Target market to resolve"}},"revokeRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"sell(uint256,uint8,uint256,uint256)":{"details":"Reverse CPMM: user gives outcome tokens, receives USDC minus fee.         CEI pattern:           Checks (market state, outcome, slippage)           \u2192 Effects (reserve update, fee accrual)           \u2192 Interactions (burn tokens, send fee, transfer USDC)","params":{"marketId":"Target market ID","minUsdcOut":"Minimum USDC to receive after fee (slippage protection)","outcome":"1 = YES, 2 = NO","tokenAmountIn":"Outcome tokens to sell"},"returns":{"usdcOut":"     Net USDC received by seller (after fee deduction)"}},"setFeeBps(uint256)":{"details":"Only DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE (set by governance via Timelock).         Maximum allowed fee is 100 bps (1%) to protect traders.","params":{"newFee":"New fee in basis points (0\u2013100 inclusive)"}},"supportsInterface(bytes4)":{"details":"See {IERC165-supportsInterface}."},"unpause()":{"details":"Only callable by PAUSER_ROLE"},"upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes)":{"custom:oz-upgrades-unsafe-allow-reachable":"delegatecall","details":"Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event."}},"stateVariables":{"feeBps":{"details":"Default is 30 (0.3%). Governance can reduce or raise up to 100 (1%)."}},"title":"PredictionMarketV2","version":1},"userdoc":{"errors":{"FeeTooHigh(uint256)":[{"notice":"Reverts when a proposed fee exceeds the 1% maximum"}],"InsufficientOutputReserve()":[{"notice":"Reverts when amountOut would equal or exceed the output reserve"}],"ZeroReserve()":[{"notice":"Reverts when either reserve is zero (undefined AMM state)"}]},"events":{"CollateralMinted(uint256,address,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when a user mints an equal set of YES+NO tokens"},"FeeBpsUpdated(uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when governance updates the protocol fee"},"LiquidityAdded(uint256,address,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when liquidity is added to a market's AMM"},"LiquidityRemoved(uint256,address,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"Emitted when liquidity is removed from a market's AMM"},"MarketCreated(uint256,string,address,address)":{"notice":"Emitted when a addLiquidity(uint256,uint256,uint256).details: Mints LP shares proportional to USDC contribution relative to         existing totalCollateral. Both YES and NO reserves grow proportionally.         CEI: slippage check → effects (shares, reserves) → interactions (pull USDC, mint tokens).

params.minLpShares: Minimum LP shares to receive (slippage protection)

buy(uint256,uint8,uint256,uint256).details: Identical logic to V1 buy() except FEE_BPS is replaced with feeBps.         CEI pattern:           Checks (market state, outcome validity, slippage)           → Effects (reserve update, fee accrual)           → Interactions (pull USDC, send fee, transfer outcome tokens)

params.amountIn: USDC amount to spend (must be pre-approved)
params.minAmountOut: Minimum outcome tokens to receive (slippage protection)

createMarket(string,address,uint256,uint.details: CEI pattern:           Checks: question non-empty, valid feed, future resolution, liquidity > 0           Effects: writes market struct, LP shares, reserves           Interactions: pull USDC, mint outcome tokens         Only callable by MARKET_CREATOR_ROLE.

params.initialLiquidity: USDC amount used to seed the AMM (split equally YES/NO)
params.oracleFeed: Chainlink feed address used for resolution
params.question: Human-readable question string
params.resolutionTime: Earliest Unix timestamp at which oracle resolution is valid

getPrice(uint256,uint8).details: price(YES) = noReserve / (yesReserve + noReserve) * 1e18         price(NO)  = yesReserve / (yesReserve + noReserve) * 1e18

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

initialize(address,address,address,addre.details: Must be called exactly once via the proxy's initialize() call.         Grants all roles to _admin.

initializeV2().details: Uses reinitializer(2) — can only be called once per proxy after V1.         Sets version = 2 and feeBps = 30 (same default as V1 constant).

mintOutcomeTokens(uint256,uint256).details: Useful for providing two-sided positions without going through AMM.         CEI: check amount > 0, pull USDC, mint tokens, update collateral.

params.amount: USDC to lock; user receives `amount` YES + `amount` NO tokens

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

redeemWinningTokens(uint256).details: Payout = userBalance * totalCollateral / totalWinningSupply         CEI pattern strictly enforced: balance checks → state updates         (burn) → USDC transfer.

removeLiquidity(uint256,uint256,uint256).details: Burns `lpShares` from msg.sender and returns proportional USDC.         Corresponding outcome tokens held by the contract are burned too.         removeLiquidity is NOT guarded by whenNotPaused so LPs can always exit.

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

resolveMarket(uint256).details: Can be called by anyone once resolutionTime has passed and the         oracle data is fresh. Price > 0 → YES wins; price == 0 → NO wins.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

sell(uint256,uint8,uint256,uint256).details: Reverse CPMM: user gives outcome tokens, receives USDC minus fee.         CEI pattern:           Checks (market state, outcome, slippage)           → Effects (reserve update, fee accrual)           → Interactions (burn tokens, send fee, transfer USDC)

params.minUsdcOut: Minimum USDC to receive after fee (slippage protection)

returns.usdcOut: Net USDC received by seller (after fee deduction)

setFeeBps(uint256).details: Only DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE (set by governance via Timelock).         Maximum allowed fee is 100 bps (1%) to protect traders.

params.newFee: New fee in basis points (0–100 inclusive)

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

MARKET_CREATOR_ROLE().notice: Role that permits creating new markets (granted via governance)

PAUSER_ROLE().notice: Role that permits pausing/unpausing the contract

addLiquidity(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Adds proportional liquidity to a market's AMM reserves

buy(uint256,uint8,uint256,uint256).notice: Buys outcome tokens using USDC, applying the dynamic fee rate

createMarket(string,address,uint256,uint.notice: Creates a new binary prediction market seeded with initial USDC liquidity

feeBps().notice: Governable fee rate in basis points (replaces constant FEE_BPS)

getLpShares(uint256,address).notice: Returns the LP share balance for an address in a given market

getMarket(uint256).notice: Returns the full Market struct for a given market ID

getPrice(uint256,uint8).notice: Returns the AMM spot price of an outcome token in 1e18 fixed-point

getTotalLpShares(uint256).notice: Returns the total LP shares for a given market

initializeV2().notice: Upgrades a V1 proxy to V2 state

marketCount().notice: Returns the current total market count

mintOutcomeTokens(uint256,uint256).notice: Mints an equal amount of YES and NO outcome tokens against USDC

redeemWinningTokens(uint256).notice: Redeems winning outcome tokens for a proportional USDC payout

removeLiquidity(uint256,uint256,uint256).notice: Removes liquidity proportional to LP shares burned

resolveMarket(uint256).notice: Resolves a market using its Chainlink oracle feed

sell(uint256,uint8,uint256,uint256).notice: Sells outcome tokens back to the AMM for USDC

usdc().notice: Address of the USDC ERC-20 token used as collateral

version().notice: Semantic version set to 2 during initializeV2()
